evidence: Implemented runtime operator-aware search engine while preserving full-text default path: no operators uses existing FTS/fallback pipeline; operator clauses (path/file/tag/line/section/[property]/[property:value]) are parsed and evaluated centrally in runtime with mixed bare-term AND semantics and malformed-operator fallback when no valid clause exists.
